name: startup_analysis
description: Android App Launch Performance Analysis using Perfetto Stdlib

queries.startups: INCLUDE PERFETTO MODULE android.startup.startups; INCLUDE PERFETTO MODULE android.startup.time_to_display; SELECT s.startup_id, s.package, s.startup_type, s.dur/1000000.0 as dur_ms, ttd.time_to_initial_display/1000000.0 as ttid_ms, ttd.time_to_full_display/1000000.0 as ttfd_ms FROM android_startups s LEFT JOIN android_startup_time_to_display ttd USING(startup_id)
queries.breakdown: INCLUDE PERFETTO MODULE android.startup.startup_breakdowns; SELECT reason, SUM(dur)/1000000.0 as total_dur_ms FROM android_startup_opinionated_breakdown WHERE startup_id = {startup_id} GROUP BY reason
queries.thread_states: INCLUDE PERFETTO MODULE android.startup.startups; SELECT state, SUM(dur)/1000000.0 AS total_dur_ms FROM thread_state WHERE utid = (SELECT utid FROM thread WHERE upid = (SELECT upid FROM process WHERE name = (SELECT package FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = {startup_id})) AND is_main_thread = 1) AND ts >= (SELECT ts FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = {startup_id}) AND ts <= (SELECT ts + dur FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = {startup_id}) GROUP BY state
queries.cpu_freq: INCLUDE PERFETTO MODULE android.startup.startups; SELECT AVG(value)/1000.0 as avg_freq_mhz FROM counter c JOIN cpu_counter_track t ON c.track_id = t.id JOIN android_startups s ON c.ts >= s.ts AND c.ts <= s.ts + s.dur WHERE t.name = 'cpufreq' AND s.startup_id = {startup_id}
queries.top_external_blockers: INCLUDE PERFETTO MODULE sched.thread_executing_span; INCLUDE PERFETTO MODULE android.startup.startups; SELECT (SELECT name FROM process WHERE upid = (SELECT upid FROM thread WHERE utid = cp.utid)) AS blocker_process, (SELECT name FROM thread WHERE utid = cp.utid) AS blocker_thread, SUM(cp.dur) / 1000000.0 AS total_block_dur_ms FROM android_startups s JOIN thread t ON t.upid = (SELECT upid FROM process WHERE name = s.package) AND t.is_main_thread = 1 JOIN _thread_executing_span_critical_path(t.utid, s.ts, s.dur) cp WHERE s.startup_id = {startup_id} AND cp.utid != t.utid AND blocker_process IS NOT NULL AND blocker_process != s.package GROUP BY blocker_process, blocker_thread ORDER BY total_block_dur_ms DESC LIMIT 3
